name: claude-code-monitor
title: Claude Code Monitor
description: Real-time monitoring for Claude Code sessions with status tracking, usage statistics, and quick actions
author: wuyuxiangX

commands.name: sessions
commands.title: Claude Code Sessions
commands.subtitle: Claude Code Monitor
commands.description: List all Claude Code sessions with real-time status tracking

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Claude Code Status
commands.subtitle: Claude Code Monitor
commands.description: Menu bar icon showing active Claude Code sessions

commands.name: usage-dashboard
commands.title: Claude Code Usage
commands.subtitle: Claude Code Monitor
commands.description: Usage statistics dashboard with cost tracking and project breakdown

commands.name: setup
commands.title: Setup Claude Code Hooks
commands.subtitle: Claude Code Monitor
commands.description: One-click setup for Claude Code hooks to enable real-time session monitoring

commands.name: plugins
commands.title: Claude Code Extensions
commands.subtitle: Claude Code Monitor
commands.description: Manage Claude Code extensions - plugins, skills, and MCP servers

preferences.name: defaultApp
preferences.title: Default Application
preferences.description: Fallback app to focus when session's launch app is unknown

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
